title: 雲に中身はないけれど

text_block_list.text:
A few days have gone by since I became Seiun Sky's trainer.
However...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Trainer, Trainer, did you know? There's a greeeat tide coming in today! Which means... it's a perfect day for fishing!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh? Do you really need to ask? Hmm, I'll pass.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'd rather work on my wrist flicks than my leg muscles today. The fish
are calling, so let's train tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Man, time flies when you're talking about Cat Haven: The Purrcadia Project! I guess we both lost track of the time.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Is that the face of someone who wanted to talk about training
instead? Or was I just seeing things? ...Nope, must've been my
imagination!

text_block_list.name: Sky's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You're looking for Sei? Actually, you just missed her. She went
home a sec ago.

Despite becoming Seiun Sky's trainer, I haven't made any progress
with her on training at all.
Does she simply have zero desire to work on herself and win races?

And if that's true, then what am I even here for? Lost in thought, I
continue walking...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hmph. Looks like the rumors about the hopeless rookie were true.
choice_data_list: If I recall right, you're Seiun Sky's classmate...
If I recall right, you're Seiun Sky's classmate...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I will not allow you to refer to me like some common schoolmate! I am King Halo, a first-rate racer. You shall mind your manners when you address me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Though... Sigh... From the look of it, Sky really is walking all over you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
My plan to get you to leak information about Sky has gone straight to
waste! At this rate, I'll lose again... Arghhh!
choice_data_list: To Seiun Sky? Is she really that fast?
To Seiun Sky? Is she really that fast?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh?! She's not just fast, she's—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Hmph! Rather than asking that, you'd be better off seeing firsthand,
don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day, I ask Seiun Sky's teacher to let me sit in on her class.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well, well... it's finally here. The scrimmage, I mean.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That description is woefully insufficient! Today, you will finally
understand how first-rate I truly am! Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey, I get it, okay? You're first-rate, all right. Truly amazing.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You don't mean a single one of those words!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, enjoy it while you can! Because today... Today is the day I will
shut you down and achieve victory!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Shut me down, huh? Oooh, scaaary.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Both Sei and King are real fired up... Okay, Spe. No holding back!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Is Sky that scary of an opponent? You don't really hear many
good rumors about her, do you?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, recently I've only heard bad things about her. Did you know
she skips training every day?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bang!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The scrimmage kicks off in high gear. Leading the pack is...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Wh-what the?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Wait, King is taking the lead?! Doesn't Sky usually race as a front
runner?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Maybe she can't break ahead because her stamina's gone down from
her lack of training... or something? It makes sense, right?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Urgh, my leg!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. I had heard about her truancy, but for her to have fallen this
far! Perhaps I was a fool for being so wary of her.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Fine by me. Things are proceeding differently from how I had
imagined, but being first-rate is all about adaptability! I'll keep this
lead all the way to the finish!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo takes her focus off of a stumbling Seiun Sky and continues
sprinting ahead. The race goes on like this for a while...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But near the end, King Halo's pace finally starts to slow down!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff! My stamina... it's...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Mhm, King's best as a late surger. For a front runner like myself, it'd
be a real pain if she stuck to my back and passed me in the final
stretch.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: And that's why... I've been waiting for this!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Wait—whaaaaat?! Sky?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huh? Sky's leading now?! No way, since when?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Wasn't she falling behind because of her lack of training? Don't tell
me... this was all her plan from the start?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: King made this too easy! Now all that's left—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Not yet. This race isn't over just yet!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The final result: Special Week in first, with Seiun Sky close behind in
second.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
An even later surge for first, huh? Spe really accelerates like a
rocket...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Only got second, though.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: It wasn't enough. All that prep, all that planning—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
W-whoooa! Trainer?! Y-you were here? Since when? Sheesh, if you're
here you gotta say something!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Are you lonely since we never see each other at training? Man, it's
tough being this popular!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but your autograph will have to wait. I'm tuckered out, so it's
time for my afternoon siesta! Duty calls.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky leaves me with that line before fleeing the scene at an
awfully fast pace.
